fieldValues.value:
`discovery.json` schema + conformance fixture landed. `ext:discovery` extension record and I-113–I-124 invariants (R1–R12) authored (#206).

<!-- srs-integration:v1
schema:discovery.json
ext:discovery
I-113
I-114
I-115
I-116
I-117
I-118
I-119
I-120
I-121
I-122
I-123
I-124
-->

Defines a portable Discovery Contract (structured filter axes), a deterministic Text Projection, normalization rules, and an opt-in `ext:discovery` extension, plus a conformance fixture. The `discovery.json` schema, `conformance/discovery/` fixture, `ext:discovery` extension record, and I-113–I-124 invariants are all folded into the canonical spec. Full text: rfcs/rfc-012-discovery-contract-text-projection.md.
